texto: 22. Faith in God is like believing a man can walk over Niagara Falls on a tightrope while pushing a wheelbarrow. Trust in God is like getting in the wheelbarrow! To believe God can do something miraculous is one thing
autor: to risk His willingness to do it in your life is another.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a to risk His willingness to do it in your life is another.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “22. Faith in God is like believing a man can walk over Niagara Falls on a tightrope while pushing…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, james-c-dobson, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
